name: Ankyros
description: A pair of mighty gauntlets, the Ankyros were designed by the Tenno for close quarters combat. What they lack in range they make up for in speed.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: A pair of mighty gauntlets, the Ankyros were designed by the Tenno for close quarters combat. What they lack in range they make up for in speed.

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Nightwave: Prime Vault: Hotfix 30.6.1
patchlogs.changes:
Rhino Prime, Nyx Prime, Ankyros Prime, Boltor Prime, Hikou Prime, and Scindo Prime Relics have been added to the drop tables! These Relics have replaced the Zephyr and Chroma Prime Relics in the Void drop tables, Bounties, and Relic Packs.
Ankyros Prime
Ankyros Prime

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Update 25.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing Ankyros Icon in the Inventory UI.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Update 2
patchlogs.changes: Lex Prime, Paris Prime, Dakra Prime, Sicarus Prime, and Ankyros Prime have received the PBR treatment!

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.changes: The Obex, Dual Ether Daggers, Vaykor Hek and Ankyros series can now be used in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.4.1
patchlogs.changes: Disabled skins on Boltor Prime and Ankyros Prime.

patchlogs.name: Update 12.4.0
patchlogs.additions: ·         Grineer Shipyards tile set revealed with new “Hijack” game mode & Tethra’s Doom event!·         New Prime items in the Void!    Rhino Prime    Ankyros Prime    Boltor Prime    AkBronco Prime·         2x new Alternate helmets (Valkyr, Oberon)·         New Corpus Crewmen voices are here! They now have their own language and a whole new style as voted by the Design Council!
